title: cattleya × statteriana
intro: Cattleya × statteriana, also known as the Statter's Cattleya, is a hybrid orchid species obtained by crossing two different species of Cattleya orchids. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine, where its roots are believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits associated with Cattleya × statteriana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations often involve drying and powdering the roots, which can be used in teas, infusions, or applied topically as a poultice.
